title: serapias cordigera subsp. neglecta
intro: Serapias cordigera subsp. neglecta, also known as the Yellow Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the Serapias genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, including diarrhea and indigestion, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The Yellow Bee Orchid has been found to offer several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against oxidative damage. Herbal preparations of Serapias cordigera subsp. neglecta typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
